chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2032 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2407/2025. 2. For hearing of CMA No.9222/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 06.02.2025 Mr. Awais Z. Sarki, advocate for the petitioners. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, application dated 15.05.2011 is pending before the respondent 1 and the petitioners merely seek to have it determined. Learned Assistant Attorney General states that the relevant application shall be decided expeditiously, preferably within one month, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners. In view hereof, petition is disposed of. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
